creator: des@FreeBSD.org
text: The first and third item have now been taken care of.  I will shelve the second for now.  As for the fourth, I had forgotten that you can force local-unbound-setup to configure local-unbound as a recursing resolver by removing all nameserver lines from resolv.conf before running it (you may have to remove /var/unbound/forward.conf if it already exists).  I will work on improving this feature.
